programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: France faces Morocco in a quarterfinal match of the FIFA World Cup at Boston Stadium. France defeated Paraguay 1-0 in the Round of 16 with the goal scored by Kylian Mbappé. Morocco won against Canada 3-0 where Azzedine Ounahi scored twice.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Belgium and Spain meet in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Los Angeles Stadium. Spain beat Portugal 1-0 behind a stoppage-time goal from midfielder Mikel Merino. Belgium dominated USA 4-1 in which forward Charles De Ketelaere netted a brace.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Norway and England meet in the FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Miami Stadium. Norway beat Brazil 2-1 behind Erling Haaland's late brace, while England defeated Mexico 3-2 behind Jude Bellingham's brace and Harry Kane's clutch penalty sealed the win.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina plays Switzerland in a Quarterfinals match of the FIFA World Cup at Kansas City Stadium. Argentina beat Egypt 3-2, with Lionel Messi scoring his eighth goal of the tournament. Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in a penalty shootout.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina faces Cabo Verde in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. Cabo Verde finished second in Group H after a 0-0 draw with Saudi Arabia. Argentina ranked first following a 3-1 win over Jordan in their final Group J match.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina plays Egypt in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Argentina beat Cabo Verde 3-2 behind Lionel Messi's 20th World Cup goal, while Egypt defeated Australia 4-2 on penalties, sealed by Hossam Abdelmaguid.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Portugal plays Spain in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. Portugal advanced after a 2-1 win over Croatia with a penalty by Cristiano Ronaldo; Spain entered following a 3-0 shutout of Austria led by a Mikel Oyarzabal brace.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Brazil takes on Norway at New York New Jersey Stadium in the World Cup Round of 16. Brazil secured a thrilling 2-1 win over Japan on Gabriel Martinelli's 96th-minute goal. Erling Haaland's 86th-minute strike led Norway past Cote d'Ivoire 2-1.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Mexico faces England in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Mexico City Stadium. Mexico defeated Ecuador 2-0 with goals scored by Raul Jimenez and Julian Quinones. England won against Congo DR 2-1 with both goals scored by Harry Kane.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Michael Nantz, a Marine staff sergeant, renders his services again, soon after his retirement. He and his platoon have to save the city of Los Angeles from alien invaders.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: When Gargamel learns that Smurfette knows a secret spell that can turn Naughties, Smurf-like creatures, into real Smurfs, he kidnaps her. The Smurfs set out to rescue Smurfette.

programme.title: The Water Horse
programme.desc: Young Angus Mac Morrow discovers a mysterious egg that grows up to be the Loch Ness monster. As they form a strong relationship, the boy's family refuses to believe in the creature's existence.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Sonny and Sam find an ancient manuscript in an abandoned house while cleaning it. However, things escalate when the text brings a ventriloquist dummy named Slappy to life.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie, a journalist, is determined to expose the Life Foundation, for performing unethical experiments on humans. During his investigation, a symbiotic alien merges with him, ensuing chaos.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Count Dracula is overjoyed to witness the birth of his grandson, Dennis. However, when Dennis shows no signs of being a vampire, Dracula tries to help him unlock his powers.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Mike and Marcus, the Miami Police Department detectives, investigate the flow of drugs into Miami. Their search leads them to a dangerous drug lord who is planning to control the city's drug trade.

Generasi Kanvas membawakan kisah-kisah pelajar terpilih dalam menelusuri sistem pendidikan negara yang mempunyai pelbagai cabang dan opsyen. Episod ini memaparkan kisah Dayang Effa Natasha Awang Zamri, seorang pelajar dari Sekolah Seni Malays

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: Blu, a domesticated blue macaw, is brought to Rio de Janeiro to meet Jewel, the last known female of his species. However, things take a turn when they are kidnapped by smugglers.

programme.title: King Of Serpant
programme.desc: A man's small village faces certain death unless he kills a giant python. So, he leads the hunt against the beast to keep his village safe.

programme.title: The Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: A family vacation takes a detour when workaholic realtor Jim Evers stops to close a deal at a remote mansion. However, they soon realise the estate is haunted by a restless spirit.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A smart but sensible new graduate lands a job as an assistant to Miranda Priestly, the demanding editor-in-chief of a high fashion magazine.

programme.title: We Bought a Zoo

programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Riley moves to San Francisco, leaving behind her life in Minnesota. She and her five core emotions, Fear, Anger, Joy, Disgust and Sadness, struggle to cope with her new life.

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: A young Nazi adherent, Jojo Betzler, whose imaginary companion is a comical imitation of Adolf Hitler, finds his beliefs challenged when he discovers the presence of a hidden Jewish girl in his house.

programme.title: The Namesake

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 48
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 15
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 121
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 39
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 16
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 16
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.title: Papadom 2

programme.title: Suamiku Encik Perfect 10
programme.desc: Kisah Aleeya Azmeen yang terpaksa berlakon sebagai pasangan suami isteri dengan Zarief Daniel selepas mengandungkan anak teman lelakinya di London. Lakonan Aaron Aziz, Lisa Surihani, Normah Damanhuri, Syazwan Zulkifli, Raja Ilya, Jasmine Hamid dan Jehan Miskin.

programme.title: Mr. Cinderella
programme.desc: Puteri Megawati yang terhutang budi dengan seorang pemuda misteri yang menyelamatkannya dari kemalangan mula mencari pemuda tersebut dengan sebelah kasut yang tertinggal di tempat kejadian.

programme.title: Lanchang Kuning
programme.desc: Kisah percintaan hasad dengki dan dendam di zaman keagongan raja melayu. Dibintangi oleh Nordin Ahmad dan Latifah Omar.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih Ep01
programme.desc: Adelia is crushed by grief and work pressure after her husband Haoyu's death. His friend Adeef is equally shaken. As both seek healing, will their paths converge? A moving story of hope and renewal.

programme.title: Lemak Kampung Santan
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda kota bernama Ridzuan jatuh cinta dengan gadis kampung bernama Tiqa. Tetapi percintaan mereka tidak semudah yang disangka.

programme.title: Cupcake Mama
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Hanna, isteri dan ibu yang bosan dengan rutin hidup. Dorongan keluarga membawa dia memulakan perniagaan cupcake dari rumah, sambil mengimbangi peranan sebagai isteri, ibu dan usahawan.

programme.title: Senario The Movie Episod 2 Beach Boys
programme.desc: The Beach Boys - Azlee, Mazlan dan Wahid kembali untuk menyempurnakan misi mereka menyelamatkan sebuah resort yang hampir ditutup.

programme.title: Tuah
programme.desc: Hang Tuah yang telah hilang kerana mengembara ke masa hadapan pulang semula ke zaman asalnya untuk menyekat tindakan Hang Jebat dari menderhaka dan membunuh Sultan Melaka.

programme.title: Seandainya Kau Ada
programme.desc: Pasangan kekasih berpisah tatkala lelaki yang dikasihi pergi melanjutkan pelajaran. Dia berjanji akan mengahwini pasangannya bila dia kembali. Tetapi terhalang setelah dia temui perenpuan lain.

programme.title: Sultan Mahmood Mangkat Dijulang
programme.desc: Seorang pembesar istana tidak berpuas hati dengan perkahwinan Dang Anum sanggup melakukan fitnah hingga Dang Anum mati dibunuh Sultan.

programme.title: Bisik Pada Langit
programme.desc: Kisah Wak Selamat yang berkeras untuk melalawat Siti Hajar anak perempuan kesayangannya yang nazak di Australia akibat kemalangan motor. Lakonan Jalil Hamid, Ummi Nazeera, Beto Kushairy, Erwin Dawson, Naim Daniel.

programme.title: Cinta Paling Agung
programme.desc: Seorang isteri memenuhi permintaan suaminya untuk bercerai dengan satu syarat suaminya harus mendukungnya setiap hari, seperti ketika mereka mula-mula berkahwin dahulu, selama tiga puluh hari.

programme.title: Mr. Cinderella 2
